## Problem

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional: what other approaches did you think about? Why this one? -->

## Scope check

Opale is a **single-organisation, self-hosted RMM**. Multi-tenancy,
SaaS features, and broad MDM/IdP support are out of scope unless they
clearly serve the core use case. Briefly explain how your request fits.

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can write the code
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] I'm just suggesting
